name: Western Uranium & Vanadium Corp.
description: Western Uranium & Vanadium Corp. is a Colorado-based uranium and vanadium conventional mining company focused on the production of energy fuels and industrial minerals. The company holds a substantial portfolio of uranium and vanadium assets in the western United States, specifically within the Uravan Mineral Belt and the San Rafael Uranium District. Utilizing its proprietary Kinetic Separation process, Western Uranium aims to efficiently extract high-grade ore from its properties, including the Sunday Mine Complex. The company is positioned to supply the nuclear power industry and the growing vanadium redox flow battery market.
